summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Pipeline Card Redesign (iteration 220). All 14 features verified: 1) No 'Flagged in recap' or 'No action needed' text, 2) Emory shows 'No response for 4 days — send a follow-up now' status with 'Re-engage Emory University' action, 3) All CTA buttons say 'View school →', 4) Section labels: 'ACT NOW', 'KEEP THINGS MOVING', 'JUST KEEP AN EYE', 5) Stage context micro-labels visible (e.g., 'Outreach — waiting for response'), 6) No contradictions (On track + follow-up), 7) 'TOP PRIORITY' badge on Emory, '4 days overdue' timing badge, 8) Hero CTA says 'View school →', 9) Creighton monitor row shows 'View school' link, 10) Swipeable cards present (4 found), 11) Card click navigates to /pipeline/{program_id}, 12) Kanban shows 'On track' instead of 'No action needed', 13) Backend API returns correct data, 14) Mobile responsive at 390px.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline Card Redesign testing complete (iteration 220). All 7 design changes verified: 1) Removed system language ('Flagged in recap', 'No action needed'), 2) Stronger action copy (overdue → 'No response for X days — send a follow-up now'), 3) Fixed contradictions (no 'On track' + 'Follow up'), 4) Card structure: school name + stage + ONE status + ONE action + CTA, 5) CTA consistency: all 'View school →', 6) Section labels: 'Act now', 'Keep things moving', 'Just keep an eye', 7) Stage context under progress bar ('Outreach — waiting for response'). Key files: computeAttention.js (text generation), PriorityBoard.js (card UI), KanbanBoard.js (kanban view), PipelineHero.js (hero CTA). 5 schools in pipeline: Emory (high/act now, 4d overdue), Stanford (high/act now, tomorrow), Florida (high/act now, tomorrow), UCLA (medium/keep things moving, tomorrow), Creighton (low/just keep an eye).

frontend_no_forbidden_text: No 'Flagged in recap' text on any card
No 'No action needed' text on any card
emory_card_content: Status: 'No response for 4 days — send a follow-up now'
cta_buttons: All CTA buttons say 'View school →' (5 found)
Creighton monitor row shows 'View school' link
section_labels: 'Just keep an eye' section label present
backend_api: No forbidden text in API response
